arguments.argument: if [ ! -e "server-go/typescript-go/.git" ]; then git submodule update --init server-go/typescript-go; fi

set -e; for patch in $(find "${0}" -name '*.patch' | sort); do if git apply --reverse --check "$patch" >/dev/null 2>&1; then :; else GIT_COMMITTER_NAME='SonarJS CI' GIT_COMMITTER_EMAIL='sonarjs-ci@sonarsource.com' GIT_AUTHOR_NAME='SonarJS CI' GIT_AUTHOR_EMAIL='sonarjs-ci@sonarsource.com' git am --3way --no-gpg-sign "$patch"; fi; done

fail.message: There are files in ${project.build.outputDirectory}/licenses that do not end with .txt
